stop.command: git -C D:/Meena_1/CapstoneProject/Project/SecureClaims-AI status --porcelain && git -C D:/Meena_1/CapstoneProject/Project/SecureClaims-AI add -A && git -C D:/Meena_1/CapstoneProject/Project/SecureClaims-AI commit -m "chore: auto-push changes after agent response" && git -C D:/Meena_1/CapstoneProject/Project/SecureClaims-AI push || echo No changes to push
